nasb.text: ‘Also the flesh that touches anything unclean shall not be eaten; it shall be burned with fire. As for other flesh, anyone who is clean may eat such flesh.

esv.text: “Flesh that touches any unclean thing shall not be eaten. It shall be burned up with fire. All who are clean may eat flesh,

cnv.text: “祭肉若是接觸了任何不潔，就不可以吃，要用火燒掉。潔淨的人才可以吃祭肉；

ccb.text: “祭肉如果接触到任何不洁之物，就不可以吃，要烧掉。洁净的人都可以吃平安祭的祭肉。
